text:
2-position codes may be present. 

SHORT NAME: ESRDSTG1 
ESRDSTG2 
ESRDSTG3 
 ESRDSTG4 
ESRDSTG5 

LONG NAME: ESRD_SETG_IND_1_CD 
ESRD_SETG_IND_2_CD 
ESRD_SETG_IND_3_CD 
 ESRD_SETG_IND_4_CD 
ESRD_SETG_IND_5_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 00 = IP renal dialysis-general (revenue code 0800) 
01 = IP renal dialysis-hemodialysis (revenue code 0801) 
02 = IP renal dialysis-peritoneal (non-CAPD: revenue code 0802) 
03 = IP renal dialysis-Continuous Ambulatory
